ddls:
CREATE TABLE "time_series" (
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time series */,
  "series" TEXT /* Name of the time series */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of time series (e.g., macroeconomic, microeconomic) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the time series (e.g., monthly, quarterly, yearly) */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of the time series (e.g., monthly, quarterly, yearly) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the time series data (e.g., internal, external, API) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the time series values (e.g., USD, %, units) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the time series data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the time series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting method (e.g., Auto.Arima, BSTS, ETS, THETA, BEA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the method was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON column to store method parameters (e.g., ARIMA order, seasonal parameters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., RMSE, MAE, MAPE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time series being forecasted */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting method used */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Value of the forecast */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the forecast was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the forecast */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the forecast (e.g., pending, completed, error) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_time_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_series_id") REFERENCES time_series ("time_series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES forecasting_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance evaluation */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast being evaluated */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric used */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance evaluation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_performance_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data point */,
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time series the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the historical data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the historical data point was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the historical data point */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data point (e.g., internal, external, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_time_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_series_id") REFERENCES time_series ("time_series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the session */,
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time series being forecasted */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting method used */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, completed, error) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_sessions_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES forecasting_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_sessions_time_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_series_id") REFERENCES time_series ("time_series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the member has */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the team member was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
